title: Milk Tea Shop Closing Checklist
description: Checks whether an AI-assisted milk tea shop closing workflow has the evidence, thresholds, and manager approval needed before the shop is marked closed.

evidence.title: Boba discard time recorded
evidence.recommendation: Record the discard time for cooked boba or prepared toppings before closing.

evidence.title: Tea batch discard time recorded
evidence.recommendation: Record the discard time for brewed tea batches.

evidence.title: Fridge temperature log completed
evidence.recommendation: Complete the refrigeration temperature log before closing.

evidence.title: Topping expiry labels checked
evidence.recommendation: Confirm prepared toppings are labelled, discarded, or carried over according to shop policy.

evidence.title: Cleaning and sanitizing log completed
evidence.recommendation: Record closing cleaning and sanitizing tasks.

evidence.title: Cash drawer reconciliation completed
evidence.recommendation: Reconcile the register, cash drawer, tips, and deposit before closing.

evidence.title: Delivery app orders reconciled
evidence.recommendation: Reconcile delivery app sales, cancellations, refunds, and remake notes.

evidence.title: Incident and complaint log reviewed
evidence.recommendation: Review customer complaints, injury reports, allergen incidents, or equipment issues.

approvals.title: Manager sign-off recorded
approvals.recommendation: A manager or owner must sign off before the agent marks the close complete.

thresholds.title: Cash drawer variance exceeds shop threshold
thresholds.recommendation: Escalate cash variance above $5 to a manager before closing.

blockedActions.title: Close cannot be marked complete without manager sign-off
blockedActions.reason: The workflow is trying to complete the close without the required manager approval.
blockedActions.recommendation: Pause the close, request manager sign-off, then rerun the SOP check.

blockedActions.title: Expired topping use is blocked
blockedActions.reason: The workflow attempts to use or carry over expired prepared toppings.
blockedActions.recommendation: Discard expired toppings and record the waste.
